opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: Within about 20 minutes of eating anything, my stomach blows up like a balloon, the gas pain is blinding, and I have to run to the toilet with watery diarrhoea. It's been months and now I'm scared to eat at all.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The bloating and gas pain after meals have become unbearable and I keep having to rush to the toilet, so I've basically stopped eating and I feel wiped out and dried out.

symptom_narrative.onset: started gradually about 4 months ago and has been getting worse
symptom_narrative.duration: roughly 4 months of loose stools, with the bloating attacks worst in the last few weeks
symptom_narrative.character: my belly balloons up and goes tight and drum-like within about 20 minutes of eating, with cramping pain around my belly button, loads of gas and burping, then explosive watery diarrhoea
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the gas pain is blinding when it hits — some days I can barely stand up straight
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: all across my belly, worst around the belly button
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: comes on within about 20 minutes of almost any meal and settles a bit between meals
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: not eating seems to be the only thing that helps, so I've been skipping meals
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: eating anything sets it off, and it got worse after I tried probiotic supplements
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: lots of gas and belching; sometimes my poo is bulky, pale, greasy-looking and floats and smells really foul; I think I've lost a few kilos without trying and I feel tired all the time
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: nothing like this before these last few months
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm anxious about eating and avoiding food, and I feel dried out and drained from the diarrhoea

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: I had abdominal surgery a while back and was told my gut doesn't move things along the way it should

social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: has been avoiding food because of the postprandial attacks
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives independently; very anxious about eating

objective_data_offered.value: my belly visibly balloons out and looks swollen and tight after I eat
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-reported visual appearance over video, not an examination

objective_data_offered.value: my poo is often loose and watery, and sometimes bulky, pale, greasy-looking, floats and smells really bad
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient description of stool, not a measured or examined finding

objective_data_offered.value: I think I've lost a few kilos over the last few months without trying — my clothes feel looser
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-estimated, no home scale reading given
